source_pr.title: ddl: more test cases on `admin pause/resume`
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and 
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: close #44762

Problem Summary:
a. Add more DDL statements to test `admin pause/resume/cancel`
b. Add more cases on `admin pause/resume/cancel`

### What is changed and how it works?

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [x] Unit test
- [ ] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No code

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
None
```

root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to concurrency races or unsynchronized shared state. Asynchronous state transitions need polling/Eventually-style checks. This PR stabilizes it by: Fix `DATA RACE`.

evidence: files: ddl/adminpausetest/BUILD.bazel, ddl/adminpausetest/ddl_data_generation.go, ddl/adminpausetest/ddl_stmt_cases.go, ddl/adminpausetest/global.go, ddl/adminpausetest/main_test.go, ddl/adminpausetest/pause_cancel_test.go, ddl/adminpausetest/pause_negative_test.go, ddl/adminpausetest/pause_resume_test.go, ddl/cancel_test.go, ddl/ddl.go, ddl/pausetest/BUILD.bazel, ddl/pausetest/pause_test.go, ddl/tests/adminpause/BUILD.bazel, ddl/tests/adminpause/ddl_data_generation.go, ddl/tests/adminpause/ddl_stmt_cases.go, ddl/tests/adminpause/global.go, ddl/tests/adminpause/main_test.go, ddl/tests/adminpause/pause_cancel_test.go, ddl/tests/adminpause/pause_negative_test.go, ddl/tests/adminpause/pause_resume_test.go
